data.title: Hooker Furnishings to Host Fourth Quarter and Full Year Earnings Call April 16th
data.description: Martinsville, Virginia - Hooker Furnishings Corporation (Nasdaq-GS: HOFT) is set to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter and full year of fiscal 2026. The presentation will be conducted through a teleconference and live internet webcast on Thursday, April 16, 2026, at 9:00 AM Eastern Time. Investors and stakeholders can tune in to gain insights into the company's figures and strategies for the period.

data.title: THIS EASTER SEASON, EXPLORE HOLY CROSS CEMETERY'S NEW MAUSOLEUMS, AND LOCK IN 2025 PRICING BEFORE APRIL 13
data.description: Join us for a special Free Open House Weekend on April 11 and 12 in North Arlington, N.J, brought to you by PRNewswire. The event will provide a sacred setting for visitors to experience, along with significant savings. This initiative is centered around the message of hope inspired by the Resurrection. Catholics gearing up to celebrate the resurrection of Jesus Christ during this Easter season will find solace and connection during this event.

data.title: AH Realty Trust to Report First Quarter Earnings on May 4th
data.description: The company is set to review its financial performance for the first quarter on May 5th. The discussion will focus on key figures such as revenue, profits, and overall growth during the initial three months of the year. This event will provide stakeholders with insights into the company's financial health and outlook moving forward. It is an important opportunity for investors and analysts to assess the company's performance and strategic direction.

data.title: 13 Press Releases You Need to See This Week
data.description: In recent news, Lily's GLP-1 pill has received FDA approval, marking a significant milestone for the company. KitchenAid has unveiled its latest innovation, a new mixer aimed at revolutionizing the cooking experience. Additionally, United Airlines has introduced a new TSA wait time tracker, aiming to enhance passenger experience. As Easter approaches, timely updates from the holiday season are surfacing.
